meta.title: Mingrun Tech - Environment AI Workbench
meta.description: Offline-first environment AI device and data workflow.
hero.title:
See your surroundings.
Understand them.
hero.body: A wearable AI device that sees your environment and responds in real time. No phone. No app.
highlights.title: Three core capabilities.
highlights.detail0.label: Wearable
highlights.detail0.body: Chest camera + capsule case + wireless earbuds — three in one.
highlights.detail1.label: Instant feedback
highlights.detail1.body: Capture a scene, get an AI voice response in seconds.
highlights.detail2.label: Privacy in your hands
highlights.detail2.body: You decide when it starts and stops. Status light always visible.
ecosystem.title: More than hardware.
ecosystem.body: From data collection to model training, from personalization to cloud deployment — a complete AI workbench that makes your device smarter over time.
ecosystem.detail0.label: Data workspace
ecosystem.detail0.body: Upload, annotate, and version your data in one place.
ecosystem.detail1.label: Model training
ecosystem.detail1.body: Launch training jobs with one click. Watch curves and logs in real time.
ecosystem.detail2.label: On-device deployment
ecosystem.detail2.body: Push models to devices. Inference works offline.
craft.title: Every last detail.
craft.body: A 112° precision-damped hinge, magnetically detachable camera, and tactile open-close — industrial design built for daily use.
cta.title: Ready?
cta.body: Try the online demo, or explore the full product.
